backend/main.mo: Main actor for the IPGT backend, handling IP record registration and querying, user profile management, and access control via Internet Identity authentication.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the migration module for the backend actor state, currently a no-op passthrough that preserves existing IP records and ID counter.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the Internet Identity authentication gate on the Register IP page to its relevant source files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing the IPGT Black/Gold/White theme, component responsibilities, and page-level functionality.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS base layer with light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's color tokens, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the IPGT page title, favicon, and mounting the React app via the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper pages, all nested under the Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedWorldMap: Three.js/React Three Fiber component rendering an interactive 3D globe with a world-map texture, atmosphere glow, and star field background.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with IPGT branding, navigation links, platform features list, legal links, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, and Internet Identity login/logout button, including mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Card component displaying a summary of an IP record including title, category badge, description, jurisdiction, date, and truncated SHA-256 hash.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: Modal dialog showing full details of an IP record, including metadata fields and copyable hash values, with an on-chain confirmation banner.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, router Outlet, and ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal that prompts newly authenticated users to create a profile (name, organisation, email) before using the app.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: Modal shown after successful IP registration, displaying the new IP ID with a copy button and on-chain confirmation message.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Stub component that renders nothing; retained to prevent import errors after the token stats feature was removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the Internet Computer, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, IP records (search, filter, list), and IP registration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a dark-themed design system with gold accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Placeholder page component that renders nothing (returns null).
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with an animated world map background, gold-styled CTA panels linking to IP registration and the database, and sections highlighting platform features.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Page that displays all registered IP records with search, category, and jurisdiction filtering, rendering results as cards with a detail modal on selection.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: React page for registering intellectual property records, including a form with title, description, category, jurisdiction, and optional file upload with SHA-256 hashing. Requires Internet Identity authentication to access the form; unauthenticated users see a login prompt.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: React page that renders the IPGT platform whitepaper as a multi-section document with a sidebar table of contents and a print button. Covers abstract, introduction, problem statement, and additional sections about the decentralized IP registry.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persist them to sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-themed design system with custom gold and black color palettes, Playfair Display/Inter fonts, gold glow box shadows, and accordion animations, plus the typography and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the IP Registry application's architecture, existing features, and pending feature requests such as on-chain stable storage persistence, Internet Identity auth gating, and public IP database browsing/search.
